Operation 'extractFileData' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about asynchronous processing model, return value (job ID), and how to retrieve results. Added information about job ID return, asynchronous nature, and reference to related endpoint for AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Upload and process documents to extract structured data. Supports PDF documents, images, spreadsheets, and text documents. Most documents complete within 10-30 seconds.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit document for structured data extraction
data.description_suggestion: Submits a document for AI-powered data extraction and conversion to structured format. Supports PDF documents, images, spreadsheets, and text documents. Returns a job ID for tracking asynchronous processing. Most documents complete within 10-30 seconds. Processing is asynchronous; use the returned job ID with the Get Job Result endpoint to retrieve extracted data.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about asynchronous processing model, return value (job ID), and how to retrieve results. Added information about job ID return, asynchronous nature, and reference to related endpoint for AI agent workflow understanding.

message: Operation 'getJobResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about required input (job ID), what constitutes the output (extracted data vs. status), and the relationship to the extraction submission endpoint. Enhanced to clarify input requirements, possible output states, and data retention policy for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve extraction job results and processing status. Job results are stored for 24 hours.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve extraction job results and status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results and current processing status of a submitted extraction job. Requires the job ID returned from the Extract File Data endpoint. Returns extracted structured data upon completion or current processing status if still in progress. Job results are retained for 24 hours after completion.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about required input (job ID), what constitutes the output (extracted data vs. status), and the relationship to the extraction submission endpoint. Enhanced to clarify input requirements, possible output states, and data retention policy for better AI agent decision-making.
